name: Carnival of Nice
traditions: Flower battle parades with decorated floats; giant papier-mâché king figure; corso carnavalesque (night parade); confetti battles.
historicalBackground: Nice Carnival dates to 1294 when Charles of Anjou mentioned it. The modern format with floats and flower battles was established in the 19th century.
description: The French Riviera's dazzling carnival, famous for its flower battle parades where performers throw thousands of fresh blooms to spectators.
